economic_notes: Council operates Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership as government business enterprises. Fiber to the Home Project underway ($9.1M). CMHC Section 95 housing program with 16 new units under construction on Hawthorne Road. 10-year Grant with ISC (New Funding Relationship) in effect April 1, 2019 to March 31, 2029.
notes: Nation straddles Ontario/Quebec border (Akwesasne territory). Province listed as ON (Cornwall, ON auditor address). Large portfolio investments of $416.5M held. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $36.7M to $59.0M, partially attributed to COVID-19 pandemic deferral of program funds. One consolidated subsidiary (Akwesasne Corp.) and two GBEs (Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership) on modified equity basis. ISC-specific deferred revenue is $47.9M. Receivables from government note shows ISC receivable of $1.77M but ISC-specific funding total not separately broken out on income statement. Schedules 1-6 are unaudited supplementary information. Infrastructure & Housing expenses included under that department at $10,527,714. Justice expenses $2,947,130 and Mohawk Government $3,202,654 and Akwesasne Mohawk Police Service $12,227,482 not mapped to standard categories above.
